messages.content:
[App: Slack] [Window: #engineering]
We decided to go with PostgreSQL for the new analytics service. Redis will handle the caching layer.
I agree, PostgreSQL is a solid choice for analytics workloads.

[App: Messages] [Window: Alice Chen]
Hey! I'm heading to the SF office on Thursday for the team offsite. Want to grab lunch at that ramen place on Mission?
Sounds great! I'll be there around noon.

[App: Discord] [Window: #dev-orchestrator]
The autocompleter v2 milestone is due by end of April. Main blockers are the memory system improvements and the new overlay renderer.
Let me prioritize the memory system work first since the overlay can be done in parallel.

[App: Terminal] [Window: vim - autocompleter/memory.py]
I'm refactoring the pre-warm cache from a single-slot to an LRU cache using OrderedDict. The cache should hold 8 entries.

[App: Mail] [Window: Re: Q2 Planning]
I'll be OOO next week (April 14-18). Sarah is covering my on-call rotation. Please loop in @david for any urgent API gateway issues.
Thanks for the heads up! I'll make sure to reach out to Sarah for on-call and David for API gateway.

[App: Gmail] [Window: Compose - Partnership Proposal]
Dear Mr. Tanaka,

I am writing to follow up on our conversation regarding the potential collaboration between our organizations. As discussed, we believe there is significant synergy in combining our respective expertise in machine learning infrastructure.
I would be delighted to schedule a follow-up meeting at your earliest convenience to discuss the next steps.

[App: Slack] [Window: #random]
lol that standup was wild. anyone wanna grab coffee? i'm heading to blue bottle in 10
haha yeah it was. i'm down, meet you there!
